name: opencli
description: Make any website or Electron App your CLI. Reuse Chrome login, zero risk, AI-powered discovery.
cautions: AI Agent 必读：创建或修改任何适配器之前，必须先阅读 CLI-EXPLORER.md！本文件仅提供命令参考和简化模板，不足以正确开发适配器。遵守3条收口规则：主参数优先 positional arg；adapter 失败优先抛 CliError 子类；新增命令需同步更新文档。

tools.name: opencli
tools.description: Invoke OpenCLI commands to interact with websites, Electron apps, and public APIs via CLI.
tools.usage: Run browser-based or public API commands using predefined adapters (e.g., bilibili, twitter, hackernews) or management/AI agent workflows (e.g., record, explore, synthesize).
